tasks.label: Apply Postgres Migrations
tasks.command: source .env.local && export PGPASSWORD="$(echo "$DATABASE_URL" | cut -d: -f3 | cut -d@ -f1)" && for f in migrations/*.sql; do echo "Applying $f..."; '/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql' -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d traildb -f "$f"; done
